name: ah-language
description: Marketplace for the .ah Teleological Semantic Format ecosystem by David C. Cavalcante. Hosts the supreme-coding-guidelines plugin and the canonical ah-parser bootstrap.

plugins.name: supreme-coding-guidelines
plugins.description: Definitive .ah skill bundle for Claude Code. Extreme token compression + surgical behavior + disciplined diagnosis + TDD + architectural control. Bundles ah-parser (one-time grammar bootstrap with three-mode output protocol) and supreme-coding-guidelines (always-on behavioral rules). User code is always preserved verbatim.
